info.title: HISE REST API
info.description: REST API for AI-assisted development in HISE

get.summary: List all available API methods as an OpenAPI 3.0.3 spec
get.description: Returns a full OpenAPI 3.0.3 JSON specification describing every registered endpoint, including parameters, request/response schemas, examples, and error codes. Use this for programmatic discovery and MCP tool generation.

logs.description: Console.print() output captured during request processing

errors.description: Script errors captured during request processing

get.summary: Get project status and discover available script processors
get.description: Returns server version, project paths, and a list of all script processors with their callbacks and external file references. Use this as the first call to discover moduleId values for other endpoints.

isMainInterface.description: True if this processor renders the plugin UI

empty.description: True if callback has no content

logs.description: Console.print() output captured during request processing

errors.description: Script errors captured during request processing

get.summary: Read script content from a processor's callbacks
get.description: Returns script content for one or all callbacks. onInit returns raw content (no function wrapper). Other callbacks return the full function signature. When no callback is specified, returns a callbacks object keyed by callback name. Also returns externalFiles with name and full path.

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: Specific callback name (e.g. onInit). If omitted, returns all callbacks.

schema.description: Specific callback name (e.g. onInit). If omitted, returns all callbacks.

callbacks.description: Object with callback names as keys and script content as values

logs.description: Console.print() output captured during request processing

errors.description: Script errors captured during request processing

404.description: Not found - unknown module or resource

post.summary: Update one or more callbacks and optionally compile
post.description: Update script content for one or more callbacks and optionally trigger compilation. Only specified callbacks are updated; others remain unchanged. The response includes compilation status, updated callback names, and any lafRenderWarning listing unrendered LAF components with reason (invisible or timeout).

callbacks.description: Object with callback names as keys and script content as values

forceSynchronousExecution.description: Debug tool: Bypass threading model for synchronous execution. WARNING: May cause crashes due to race conditions - use only as last resort after saving.

updatedCallbacks.description: Array of callback names that were updated

externalFiles.description: Array of included .js file names after compilation

warning.description: Warning when synchronous mode was used

logs.description: Console.print() output captured during request processing

errors.description: Script errors captured during request processing

404.description: Not found - unknown module or resource

post.summary: Evaluate a HISEScript expression and return the result
post.description: Evaluates a script expression using the current script engine. The processor must have been compiled at least once. Any side effects of the evaluation will change the runtime state of HISE.

logs.description: Console.print() output captured during request processing

errors.description: Script errors captured during request processing

400.description: Bad request - invalid or missing parameters

404.description: Not found - unknown module or resource

post.summary: Recompile a processor without changing its script
post.description: Recompile a processor, restoring preset values and triggering callbacks for saveInPreset components. Use after editing external .js files on disk, or to re-run initialization code. Optionally starts a profiling session alongside compilation. The response includes the externalFiles list which may have changed.

forceSynchronousExecution.description: Debug tool: Bypass threading model for synchronous execution. WARNING: May cause crashes due to race conditions - use only as last resort after saving.

profile.description: Start a profiling session alongside compilation. Retrieve results later via POST /api/testing/profile with mode="get".

durationMs.description: Profiling duration in ms when profile=true (100-5000)

externalFiles.description: Array of included .js file names after compilation

warning.description: Warning when synchronous mode was used

logs.description: Console.print() output captured during request processing

errors.description: Script errors captured during request processing

404.description: Not found - unknown module or resource

get.summary: List all UI components in a script processor
get.description: Returns a flat list or hierarchical tree of all UI components. Flat list includes id, type, and laf info. Hierarchical tree adds layout properties (x, y, width, height, visible, enabled) and nested childComponents.

parameters.name: hierarchy
parameters.description: If true, returns nested tree with layout properties

schema.description: If true, returns nested tree with layout properties

logs.description: Console.print() output captured during request processing

errors.description: Script errors captured during request processing

404.description: Not found - unknown module or resource

get.summary: Get all properties for a specific UI component
get.description: Returns the component type and a full array of properties with current values, default status, and available options for enum-type properties.

value.description: Current value (int, bool, string, or hex color)

isDefault.description: True if value has not been explicitly changed

logs.description: Console.print() output captured during request processing

errors.description: Script errors captured during request processing

400.description: Bad request - invalid or missing parameters

404.description: Not found - unknown module or resource

get.summary: Get the current runtime value of a UI component
get.description: Returns the current value and min/max range for the specified component.

min.description: Minimum value for the component's range

max.description: Maximum value for the component's range

post.summary: Set the runtime value of a UI component
post.description: Sets the component's value and triggers its control callback, just as if the user had interacted with the control. Console.print() output from the callback appears in the logs array. Use validateRange to check the value before setting.

validateRange.description: If true, validates value is within component's min/max range

forceSynchronousExecution.description: Debug tool: Bypass threading model for synchronous execution. WARNING: May cause crashes due to race conditions - use only as last resort after saving.

warning.description: Warning when synchronous mode was used

logs.description: Console.print() output captured during request processing

errors.description: Script errors captured during request processing

400.description: Bad request - invalid or missing parameters

404.description: Not found - unknown module or resource

post.summary: Set properties on one or more UI components
post.description: Set properties on UI components, similar to editing in the Interface Designer. Properties set in script (e.g. via component.set()) are locked and cannot be changed without force=true. When parentComponent is changed, recompileRequired=true is returned and you must call POST /api/recompile to apply hierarchy changes.

force.description: If true, bypasses script-lock check and sets all properties

properties.description: Array of property names that were set

recompileRequired.description: True if parentComponent was changed - call /api/recompile to apply

logs.description: Console.print() output captured during request processing

errors.description: Script errors captured during request processing

400.description: Bad request - invalid or missing parameters

404.description: Not found - unknown module or resource

get.summary: Capture screenshot of interface or specific component
get.description: Captures a PNG screenshot of the full interface or a specific component. When capturing a specific component, the screenshot is cropped to that component's bounds within the full interface render. Returns Base64 by default, or writes to file when outputPath is specified.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Component ID to capture (omit for full interface)

schema.description: Component ID to capture (omit for full interface)

parameters.name: outputPath
parameters.description: File path to save PNG (must end with .png). Writes to file instead of returning Base64

schema.description: File path to save PNG (must end with .png). Writes to file instead of returning Base64

width.description: Width of captured image in pixels

height.description: Height of captured image in pixels

imageData.description: Base64-encoded PNG data (only when outputPath not specified)

filePath.description: Full path to saved PNG file (only when outputPath specified)

logs.description: Console.print() output captured during request processing

errors.description: Script errors captured during request processing

400.description: Bad request - invalid or missing parameters

404.description: Not found - unknown module or resource

get.summary: Get the currently selected UI components from the Interface Designer
get.description: Returns all currently selected components with full property details. Components are returned in selection order (the order the user clicked them). An empty selection returns success with an empty components array. Selection is cleared when the script is recompiled.

components.description: Array of selected components with properties

logs.description: Console.print() output captured during request processing

errors.description: Script errors captured during request processing

404.description: Not found - unknown module or resource

post.summary: Execute a sequence of UI interactions in a test window
post.description: Execute mouse movements, clicks, drags, menu selections, and screenshots in a dedicated test window. Auto-inserts moveTo events as needed for proper mouse positioning. Mouse state persists across API calls. Blocks until all interactions complete (30s timeout).

pixelPosition.description: Absolute pixel position (takes precedence over normalized)

x-variants.description: Explicit mouse positioning to a component
Click at current or target position
Double-click (expands to two clicks)
Drag using pixel delta from current position
Click a menu item by text
Capture interface screenshot

verbose.description: If true, include auto-insertion details and final mouseState in response

executionLog.description: Array of executed events with timing

mouseState.description: Final mouse state object (only when verbose=true)

logs.description: Console.print() output captured during request processing

errors.description: Script errors captured during request processing

400.description: Bad request - invalid or missing parameters

post.summary: Run diagnostic-only shadow parse on a script file
post.description: Returns structured diagnostics (API hallucinations, type mismatches, language rule violations, audio-thread safety warnings) without modifying runtime state - no recompilation, no execution. Requires at least one prior successful compile. Always reads the file from disk - save pending edits before calling.

moduleId.description: The script processor's module ID. Required if filePath is not provided.

filePath.description: Path to the external .js file (absolute or relative to Scripts folder). Required if moduleId is not provided. When used alone, HISE resolves the owning processor.

async.description: If true, defer the shadow parse to the scripting thread (slower, blocks audio). Default is false: runs directly on the HTTP thread with a read lock.

moduleId.description: The resolved script processor's module ID

logs.description: Console.print() output captured during request processing

errors.description: Script errors captured during request processing

diagnostics.message: Function / constant not found: Console.prnt (did you mean: print?)

400.description: Bad request - invalid or missing parameters

404.description: Not found - unknown module or resource

get.summary: List all included external script files
get.description: Without moduleId, returns all files across all processors with owning processor names (objects with path and processor fields). With moduleId, returns files for that processor only (flat string array of full paths). Files are registered after a successful compile.

parameters.name: moduleId
parameters.description: Filter by script processor. If omitted, returns files from all processors with processor names.

schema.description: Filter by script processor. If omitted, returns files from all processors with processor names.

moduleId.description: The filtered processor ID (when moduleId was specified)

files.description: Array of file entries or path strings

logs.description: Console.print() output captured during request processing

errors.description: Script errors captured during request processing

404.description: Not found - unknown module or resource

post.summary: Start a profiling session or retrieve last result
post.description: mode="record" starts a new non-blocking session (returns immediately). mode="get" returns last result with optional filtering and summary aggregation. Workflow: record once, then query with different filters. Returns 409 if a recording is already in progress. Returns 400 if profiling toolkit is not enabled in the build.

durationMs.description: Recording duration in milliseconds (100-5000). Used in record mode.

threadFilter.description: Array of thread names to include (default: all). Valid: Audio Thread, Scripting Thread, UI Thread, Loading Thread, etc.

eventFilter.description: Array of event source types to record (default: all). Used in record mode. Valid: DSP, Script, Lock, Callback, Trace, TimerCallback, Scriptnode, etc.

summary.description: If true, aggregate repeated events with count/median/peak/min/total stats. Used in get mode.

filter.description: Wildcard pattern matched against event name (e.g. "slow*"). Case-insensitive. Used in get mode.

minDuration.description: Only include events with duration >= this value in ms. Used in get mode.

sourceTypeFilter.description: Wildcard pattern matched against sourceType (e.g. "Trace"). Case-insensitive. Used in get mode.

nested.description: When filtering, include children of matched events. Used in get mode.

limit.description: Max number of results in filtered/summary mode (1-100). Used in get mode.

wait.description: If false, return immediately when recording is in progress instead of blocking. Used in get mode.

recording.description: Whether a recording is in progress

flows.description: Array of cross-thread causal flow connections

logs.description: Console.print() output captured during request processing

errors.description: Script errors captured during request processing

400.description: Bad request - invalid or missing parameters

409.description: Conflict - operation conflicts with current state

post.summary: Parse CSS code and return structured diagnostics
post.description: Accepts either inline CSS code or a file path to a .css file. Returns diagnostics with line/column/severity/message. Optionally resolves properties for a set of selectors using CSS specificity rules.

code.description: The CSS code to parse (provide this or filePath)

filePath.description: Path to a .css file. Relative paths resolve against the Scripts/ directory (provide this or code)

selectors.description: Array of selector strings representing a component's selectors (e.g. ["button", ".my-class", "#MyId"]). Resolves properties using CSS specificity

width.description: Reference width in pixels for resolving percentage and relative units

height.description: Reference height in pixels for resolving percentage and relative units

filePath.description: The resolved CSS file path (when file was used)

logs.description: Console.print() output captured during request processing

errors.description: Script errors captured during request processing

400.description: Bad request - invalid or missing parameters

404.description: Not found - unknown module or resource

post.summary: Gracefully quit the HISE application
post.description: Schedules an asynchronous shutdown via JUCEApplication::quit(). The HTTP response is sent before the application exits.

logs.description: Console.print() output captured during request processing

errors.description: Script errors captured during request processing

get.summary: Get the runtime module tree hierarchy
get.description: Returns the nested JSON module tree with metadata, modulation, and children. Without group parameter, returns the live runtime tree. With group=current, returns the active validation tree (400 when no active group). Other group values return 501.

parameters.name: moduleId
parameters.description: Optional root module ID to return a subtree

schema.description: Optional root module ID to return a subtree

parameters.name: group
parameters.description: Optional group selector. Only 'current' is supported

schema.description: Optional group selector. Only 'current' is supported

parameters.name: queryParameters
parameters.description: If false, omit parameter lists from the tree

schema.description: If false, omit parameter lists from the tree

parameters.name: verbose
parameters.description: If true, include verbose metadata in tree nodes

schema.description: If true, include verbose metadata in tree nodes

result.description: Nested JSON tree with metadata / modulation / children

logs.description: Console.print() output captured during request processing

errors.description: Script errors captured during request processing

400.description: Bad request - invalid or missing parameters

404.description: Not found - unknown module or resource

post.summary: Apply a set of operations to the module tree
post.description: Apply one or more operations to the module tree in a single batch. When called inside an undo group (after push_group), the diff accumulates all operations in the group so far. The response contains a diff summary with the net effect - if a module was added and then modified, it shows as '+'. Operations are pre-validated before execution; invalid operations return 400 with detailed error info. Partial failure rolls back the entire batch.

x-variants.description: Add a new module (type, parent, chain, name)
Remove a module (target)
Clone a module (source, count, template?)
Set parameter values (target, attributes, mode?)
Rename a module (target, name)
Set bypass state (target, bypassed)
Set effect/network (target, effect)

logs.description: Console.print() output captured during request processing

errors.description: Script errors captured during request processing

400.description: Bad request - invalid or missing parameters

404.description: Not found - unknown module or resource

409.description: Conflict - operation conflicts with current state

post.summary: Reset the module tree to an empty state
post.description: Equivalent to File -> New. Resets the module tree to its initial empty state and clears all undo history.

post.summary: Start a new undo group
post.description: Start a new undo group. Subsequent operations are validated against group state and recorded. Actions are not executed until pop_group.

post.summary: End the current undo group
post.description: End the current undo group. With cancel=false (default), executes all queued actions as one undoable batch. With cancel=true, discards all queued actions.

cancel.description: If true, discard the group without executing

get.summary: Get the current diff state showing active changes
get.description: Returns the current diff state. With scope=group (default), shows changes in the current group only. With scope=root, shows the full stack. Use flatten=true to compute the net effect by merging cancelling actions.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: group = current group only, root = full stack

schema.description: group = current group only, root = full stack

parameters.name: flatten
parameters.description: If true, compute net effect merging cancelling actions

schema.description: If true, compute net effect merging cancelling actions

errors.description: Script errors captured during request processing

get.summary: Get the full undo history with cursor position
get.description: Returns the full undo history including redo buffer and cursor position. With scope=group, shows the current group only. With scope=root, shows the full stack with nested groups. Use flatten=true to flatten group nesting.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: group = current group only, root = full stack with nested groups

schema.description: group = current group only, root = full stack with nested groups

parameters.name: flatten
parameters.description: If true, flatten group nesting to a single list

schema.description: If true, flatten group nesting to a single list

post.description: Clears the entire undo history and exits all active groups. Returns an empty diff state.

get.summary: Get UI component tree hierarchy for a script processor
get.description: Returns a recursive tree with id, type, visible, enabled, saveInPreset, x, y, width, height, and childComponents for each node. With group=current, returns the active undo group's validation tree. Returns 501 for unsupported group values, 400 when no current group.

parameters.name: group
parameters.description: Optional group selector. 'current' returns the active plan's validation tree

schema.description: Optional group selector. 'current' returns the active plan's validation tree

result.description: Recursive tree with component properties and nested childComponents

post.summary: Apply batched UI component operations
post.description: Apply one or more UI component operations (add, remove, set, move, rename) in a single batch. Operations are pre-validated before execution; invalid operations return 400 with detailed error info. All operations are undoable via the undo API. Partial failure rolls back the entire batch. Component types: ScriptButton, ScriptSlider, ScriptPanel, ScriptComboBox, ScriptLabel, ScriptTable, ScriptImage, etc.

properties.description: Properties to set for set op

force.description: Bypass script-lock check for set op

newId.description: New component ID for rename op

x-variants.description: Add a new component (componentType, id?, parentId?, x?, y?, width?, height?)
Remove a component (target)
Set properties on a component (target, properties, force?)
Move a component to a new parent (target, parent, index?, keepPosition?)
Rename a component (target, newId)

logs.description: Console.print() output captured during request processing

errors.description: Script errors captured during request processing

400.description: Bad request - invalid or missing parameters

404.description: Not found - unknown module or resource

post.summary: Inject MIDI messages and test events with precise timing
post.description: Queue MIDI messages for dispatch via a HighResolutionTimer with sub-ms precision. Non-blocking by default: returns immediately after queuing. Notes auto-send note-off after duration. Multiple calls merge into the pending queue. Send allNotesOff to panic (clears queue). Send empty messages array to poll status. Use blocking=true or recordOutput to wait for completion.

timestamp.description: Absolute time offset in ms from start of sequence

duration.description: Note duration or signal length in ms

value.description: CC value (0-127), pitch bend (0-16383), or attribute value

x-variants.description: MIDI note with auto note-off (noteNumber, velocity?, duration?, channel?)
MIDI CC message (controller, value, channel?)
Pitch bend message (value 0-16383, channel?)
Panic: clear queue, fire all note-offs, stop test signals
Evaluate HISEScript at timestamp (expression, id?, moduleId?)
Set processor parameter at timestamp (parameterId, value, processorId?)
Inject test signal into audio stream (signal, duration?, frequency?)

blocking.description: If true, block until the sequence completes before returning (30s timeout)

recordOutput.description: File path to record audio output as WAV. Implies blocking mode. Duration is auto-computed from the sequence.

isPlaying.description: True while sequence is being dispatched or notes are active

durationMs.description: Total duration of the sequence in ms

playedEvents.description: Number of events dispatched so far

replResults.description: Array of REPL evaluation results (when available)

recordOutput.description: File path of recorded WAV (only when recordOutput was specified)

logs.description: Console.print() output captured during request processing

errors.description: Script errors captured during request processing

400.description: Bad request - invalid or missing parameters

get.description: Scans the project's DspNetworks/ folder for .xml files and returns their names (without extension). Also includes any in-memory networks that have been created via dsp/init.

logs.description: Console.print() output captured during request processing

errors.description: Script errors captured during request processing

post.summary: Create or load a DspNetwork
post.description: Creates a new DspNetwork or loads an existing one via the module's DspNetwork::Holder. If the network XML file does not exist, it is created. If it already exists, it is loaded. Returns the initial tree in the result field (same shape as GET /api/dsp/tree) plus filePath and embedded flag. The name is sanitized to a valid C++ identifier.

name.description: Network name to create or load

embedded.description: Create as embedded network rather than file-based

filePath.description: Absolute path to the network .xml file (empty for embedded networks)

logs.description: Console.print() output captured during request processing

errors.description: Script errors captured during request processing

400.description: Bad request - invalid or missing parameters

404.description: Not found - unknown module or resource

get.description: Returns the nested JSON tree of the active DspNetwork for the given module. Each node contains its nodeId, factoryPath, bypass state, parameters, and child nodes. Container nodes also have a connections array listing all modulation edges within that container (source, sourceOutput, target, parameter). Use verbose=true to include full parameter range metadata (min, max, stepSize, middlePosition, defaultValue). Use group=current inside an undo group (after push_group) to read the accumulated plan-mode snapshot before the group is committed -- returns 400 if there is no active DSP validation state, 501 for any group value other than 'current'.

parameters.name: group
parameters.description: Optional group selector. 'current' returns the active plan's validation tree (accumulated state inside an undo group, before commit)

schema.description: Optional group selector. 'current' returns the active plan's validation tree (accumulated state inside an undo group, before commit)

result.description: Recursive node tree with parameters, connections on containers, and children

logs.description: Console.print() output captured during request processing

errors.description: Script errors captured during request processing

400.description: Bad request - invalid or missing parameters

404.description: Not found - unknown module or resource

post.summary: Apply batched operations to a scriptnode graph
post.description: Apply one or more scriptnode operations in a single batch. Operations are pre-validated before execution; invalid operations return 400 with detailed error info. All operations are undoable via the undo API. When called inside an undo group (after push_group), the diff accumulates all operations in the group so far. The response contains a diff summary with the net effect. Partial failure rolls back the entire batch.

moduleId.description: Module ID of the DspNetwork holder

factoryPath.description: Factory path for add op (e.g. core.oscillator, filters.svf)

parent.description: Parent container node ID for add/move ops

source.description: Source node ID for connect/disconnect ops

target.description: Target node ID for connect/disconnect ops

parameter.description: Target parameter name for connect/disconnect ops

sourceOutput.description: Source output for connect op: parameter name (string) or output slot index (int) for multi-output mod nodes

middlePosition.description: Value at 50% of range for create_parameter (computes skew internally, mutually exclusive with skewFactor)

skewFactor.description: Raw skew factor for create_parameter (mutually exclusive with middlePosition)

x-variants.description: Add a node (factoryPath, parent, nodeId?, index?). If nodeId is provided, it must be unique - returns error if a node with that ID already exists. If nodeId is omitted, it is derived from the factory path suffix with a unique trailing index (e.g. container.chain => chain1, core.oscillator => oscillator1)
Remove a node (nodeId)
Move a node to a different container (nodeId, parent, index?)
Connect a modulation source to a parameter (source, target, parameter, sourceOutput?). sourceOutput is a parameter name (string) or output slot index (int) for multi-output mod nodes
Disconnect a modulation source (source, target, parameter)

Set a parameter value or node property (nodeId, parameterId, value). When nodeId is the root network node, also supports network-level properties: AllowCompilation (bool), AllowPolyphonic (bool), CompileChannelAmount (int), HasTail (bool), SuspendOnSilence (bool), ModulationBlockSize (power-of-2 int or 0)
Set bypass state (nodeId, bypassed)
Create a dynamic parameter on a container (nodeId, parameterId, min?, max?, defaultValue?, stepSize?, middlePosition?, skewFactor?)
Clear all nodes from the network

logs.description: Console.print() output captured during request processing

errors.description: Script errors captured during request processing

400.description: Bad request - invalid or missing parameters

404.description: Not found - unknown module or resource

post.summary: Save the active DspNetwork to its XML file
post.description: Saves the current state of the active DspNetwork to its XML file on disk. Fails if the network is embedded (embedded networks have no file-based representation).

filePath.description: Absolute path to the saved .xml file

logs.description: Console.print() output captured during request processing

errors.description: Script errors captured during request processing

400.description: Bad request - invalid or missing parameters

404.description: Not found - unknown module or resource
